hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' </dev/stdin); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.claude/agents/.*\.md$'; then mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs" && echo "$(date -Iseconds) $FILE_PATH (edit detected; consider running /audit-subagents)" >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs/subagent-edits.log"; fi

STDIN=$(cat /dev/stdin); SUB=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // ""'); DESC=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""' | cut -c1-100); mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs" && jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sub "$SUB" --arg desc "$DESC" '{ts: $ts, event: "agent_complete", subagent_type: $sub, description: $desc}' >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs/workflow-events.jsonl"

STDIN=$(cat /dev/stdin); CMD=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | cut -c1-200); mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs" && jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg cmd "$CMD" '{ts: $ts, event: "bash_complete", command: $cmd}' >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs/workflow-events.jsonl"
